title: The Tragedy of King Richard the Second
original_title: National Theatre Live: The Tragedy of King Richard the Second
overview: Simon Russell Beale plays William Shakespeare’s Richard II, broadcast live from the stage of the Almeida Theatre in London to cinemas.
